disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute worsening of high-volume, frequent diarrhoea (about 15 episodes today) on a background of months of intermittent loose bowels
trigger_question_examples: How many times have you opened your bowels today?
How long has the diarrhoea been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost count — around 15 times today. It's normally on and off but today it just won't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bulky, foul-smelling, greasy stools that float and are hard to flush
trigger_question_examples: What do the stools look like?
Are they greasy, pale or hard to flush?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're bulky and really smelly, kind of greasy and pale, and they float so they're hard to flush away.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked dizziness and room-spinning on standing, with near-fainting; too unsteady to walk safely
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you stand up?
Have you felt faint or like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stand the room spins and everything goes swimmy — I feel like I'm going to black out, so I have to sit straight back down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss over about six months despite a normal or good appetite
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I've been dropping weight over the last few months even though I'm eating normally — my clothes are loose now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Anaemia that has not improved despite regular oral iron supplementation
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any blood tests recently?
Are you on any regular tablets, and are they helping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They found my iron was low a while back and put me on iron tablets, but I've been taking them and they don't seem to make any difference.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intensely itchy grouped blisters on the extensor surfaces of the elbows and forearms
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any rashes anywhere?
Can you describe the rash on your elbows?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got these really itchy little blisters grouped on my elbows and forearms — I keep scratching them raw.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue and exhaustion present for months
trigger_question_examples: How have your energy levels been?
Have you been more tired than usual lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been absolutely shattered for months — no energy at all, and it's just getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is currently unable to prepare food or obtain drinks safely because of the dizziness — fall risk
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone with you at home?
Are you able to get yourself food and drinks today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and there's no one here. I can't safely get to the kitchen for a drink because I'm so dizzy.
